name: Executive Filter
notes: Routes all agent outputs to Erik. Categorizes: Immediate Decision / Strategic Review / Monitor / Delegate.

name: Intelligence Scanner
notes: Monitors regulatory, market, and threat signals for qualifying companies in target sectors. Detects leadership changes, rulemaking, and enforcement actions.

name: Fit & Gap Scorer
notes: Applies hardening fit score. Computes 3-State Gap Model: Beginning / Current / Desired state.

name: Risk Analyst
notes: Classifies exposure categories. Defensive modeling only. Produces risk register and mitigation plan.

name: Strategy Director
notes: Converts intelligence into strategic roadmaps. Produces 90-day engagement plans and executive briefs. Erik Herring is final approver of all outputs.

name: Decision Integrity Auditor
notes: Logs every override. Compares system vs human decisions. Detects drift. Triggers Decision Review Sessions when threshold exceeded.

name: Capacity Monitor
notes: Tracks engagement load and DevOps pipeline health. Monitors for overload conditions and blocks premature activations.

name: DevOps & Data Integrity
notes: Maintains PostgreSQL schema, validates CI/CD, monitors audit log integrity. Enforces schema discipline.

name: SG Decision & Audit API
notes: Azure Functions API: POST /api/decisions, GET /api/review-queue. PostgreSQL backed with Zod validation.
